summary: Production feature verification audit for LeadixAI completed. Backend plan-based rate limiting, funnel limits, lead storage limits, and API enforcement all working correctly. Public funnel branding feature verified. Frontend dashboard access had loading issues but core functionality confirmed through backend testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Network loading issues preventing full dashboard access during testing
ui_bugs.note: May be temporary network/CDN issues, core functionality verified via backend

passed_tests: Backend /api/usage endpoint returns correct plan limits (5/month starter, unlimited pro/growth)
Backend /api/check-limits enforces funnel limit (1 starter, blocks 2nd funnel)
Backend /api/check-limits enforces lead limit (50 starter, blocks at limit)
Backend /api/check-limits allows unlimited content for pro plan
Backend /api/generate-carousel accepts user_id and plan params with rate limiting
Backend /api/generate-poll-content accepts user_id and plan params with rate limiting
Public funnel page loads and displays content correctly
Public funnel shows branding footer for starter plan ('Powered by LeadixAI')
Rate limiting enforcement working (5/month content limit hit for starter plan)
All backend API endpoints functional with proper limit enforcement
